label: content
narrative: Lesson 12-05 opener with three term entries (情報デザイン, ユニバーサルデザイン, バリアフリー). Source page header '情報デザインとソフトウェアの権利' is a multi-section lesson title; the software-rights half is covered on subsequent pages. All extracted term definitions faithful to OCR prose. zh '通用设计/无障碍/信息设计' and en 'Universal Design/Barrier-Free/Information Design' are standard accessibility terminology. The closing comparison line about Universal Design vs Barrier-Free coverage scope is preserved in zh/en.
